mapper.select: SELECT id, place_id, rule_type, start_date, end_date, week_day, holiday_name FROM rental_place_closed_rule WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND deleted = 0 AND ( (start_date IS NULL AND end_date IS NULL) OR (start_date <= #{toDate} AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= #{fromDate})) )

SELECT id, room_id, scope_type, start_datetime, end_datetime, week_day, start_time, end_time, reason FROM rental_room_unavailable_slot WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0 AND ( (scope_type = 'DATE_RANGE' AND start_datetime <= #{toDateTime} AND end_datetime >= #{fromDateTime}) OR (scope_type = 'ONE_TIME' AND start_datetime <= #{toDateTime} AND end_datetime >= #{fromDateTime}) OR (scope_type = 'WEEKLY_TIME') )
SELECT room_id, unit_minutes, price FROM rental_room_pricing_base WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT room_id, apply_to, unit_minutes, price FROM rental_room_pricing_weekend_holiday WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, room_id, date, start_time, end_time, unit_minutes, price FROM rental_room_pricing_special WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0 AND date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate}

SELECT id, room_id, user_id, start_datetime, end_datetime, status, total_price FROM rental_reservation WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted = 0 AND start_datetime <= #{toDateTime} AND end_datetime >= #{fromDateTime}
